metadata.name: Steel & Jurgec (2017) Cross-linguistic Segment Inventory
metadata.description: 95-segment cross-linguistic inventory with 24 SPE-style features covering consonants, vowels, and approximants. Values: "+" (present), "-" (absent), "0" (inapplicable/unspecified).
metadata.citation: Created by George Steel and Peter Jurgec, 2016–2017. Supported by the University of Toronto Advancing Teaching and Learning in Arts and Science (ATLAS) grant to Peter Jurgec.
